header_description.start_distance: Distance between the variant and phenotype start position (e.g., TSS)
header_description.end_distance: Distance between the variant and phenotype end position (only present if different from start position)
header_description.af: In-sample ALT allele frequency of the variant
header_description.ma_samples: Number of samples carrying at least one minor allele
header_description.pval_nominal: Nominal p-value of the association between the phenotype and variant
header_description.slope_se: Standard error of the regression slope
